checks.message: Research universe has explicit identity and survivorship metadata
checks.name: universe_metadata

checks.message: All source symbols are explicit YAML strings
checks.name: source_symbol_types

checks.message: Universe symbols are unique after market normalization
checks.name: canonical_symbol_identity

checks.message: Benchmark is reference-only and excluded from candidate ranking
checks.name: benchmark_exclusion

checks.message: Provider exists and has no synthetic/test fixture marker
checks.name: real_provider_scope

checks.message: Provider calendar does not cover the declared research interval
checks.name: calendar_coverage

checks.message: Provider contains enough fully covered research symbols
checks.name: universe_provider_coverage

checks.message: Reference benchmark is missing or lacks full coverage
checks.name: benchmark_provider_coverage

checks.message: CSV source is missing, malformed, too short, or contains invalid OHLCV values
checks.name: source_csv_integrity

checks.message: Static current-membership universe is acceptable for exploratory research but not an unbiased historical estimate
checks.name: survivorship_bias
